title: Stacked Context Panel
prompt:
Create a production-ready Stacked Context Panel using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. Design a light Bento card that summarizes a decision with two visibly offset context sheets. Selecting either sheet brings it forward, reveals a one-line rationale, and moves a single amber registration tab to the active sheet. The canvas is #F4F5F6; sheets are white with #ECECEE borders, 22px radii, very soft neutral shadows, #111111 headings, and #4A4A4F supporting copy. Amber is the only bright accent and cards themselves must never use a gradient.

Use two real buttons in a labelled group, each at least 44px high, with aria-pressed reflecting the selected context and a polite live region announcing the choice. Pointer hover can lift a sheet by 2px in 180ms; press may compress it 1px over 90ms. On selection, use a spring with stiffness 340 and damping 28 for depth and tab position, plus a 200ms opacity/transform transition for the rationale. Enter and Space must match pointer activation, the focus outline must remain a clear dark 3px ring, and tab order must be logical.

Make the stack fit a 320px preview without clipped labels, while allowing a wider detail view to show the offset composition. Use transform and opacity only; no remote media, timers, browser storage, random data, or network calls. Both selected states must be coherent with reduced motion, which should use an instant state change or 120ms fade. Maintain AA contrast and include semantic headings. Return full TypeScript React client code and a pure CSS fallback with suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* Suggested HTML:
*/ .uiwiki-context-stack{position:relative;height:160px;max-width:340px}.uiwiki-context-stack button{position:absolute;inset-inline:0;min-height:112px;padding:16px;border:1px solid #ececee;border-radius:18px;background:#fff;color:#111;text-align:left;box-shadow:0 8px 20px #1111;transition:transform 200ms ease}.uiwiki-context-stack button+button{transform:translateY(24px) scale(.96)}.uiwiki-context-stack button[aria-pressed="true"]{z-index:2;transform:translateY(0) scale(1);border-top:4px solid #f59e0b}.uiwiki-context-stack button:hover{translate:0 -2px}.uiwiki-context-stack button:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-context-stack button{transition:none}}

demoCode:
(() => { function Demo(){const [a,setA]=React.useState(0);const s=[['Evidence','Three customer signals support the direction.'],['Constraint','Launch remains inside the two-week window.']];return
DECISION CONTEXT
{s.map((x,i)=>setA(i)} animate={{y:a===i?0:i===0?12:24,scale:a===i?1:.96,zIndex:a===i?2:1}} transition={{type:'spring',stiffness:340,damping:28}} style={{position:'absolute',inset:0,padding:14,border:'1px solid #ececee',borderRadius:18,background:'#fff',textAlign:'left'}}>{x[0]}{a===i?x[1]:'Select to bring this context forward.'}{a===i&&})}
} return ; })()
